genre_preference.value: dislikes horror, thriller; mixed feelings about drama and romance
evidence: "Not a horror movie. Hardly even a thriller. Definitely not scary."
"I hated every character in this movie"
"The storyline was predictible with little to offer in the way of ingenuity or thrill factor."
"I could have sworn I saw the following scenes... I'm kinda pissed off."
"I shudder to think that these acting hacks will receive royalties from the continued running of these films."
"I truly can't believe how this film can get good reviews."
"George Lucas brings us terrible dialogue, along with some of the worst acting I've seen in quite some time."
"I would never believe that anyone could absolutely destroy the Buffyverse like the writers in Season 7 did."
"The music was fun and stuck in my head for hours afterward, and the scenery was beautiful as well."
"The only shining light in this whole movie was Elvira herself..."
"I have zero empathy for them. No need to watch this."
"I laughed out loud in the theatre when Kate Beckinsale died."

summary: The user has a strong aversion to poorly executed horror and thriller genres, often criticizing predictable narratives and low-quality production. They appreciate engaging sensory experiences but generally lack emotional connection to the characters and stories presented in the films they review.
